description_long: This is a large, modern house set on a landscaped lot with mature trees and a driveway leading to a garage. The structure features a mix of brick and white exterior finishes, with flat roofs and multiple levels, including a prominent main entrance and several large windows. The property is enclosed by a fence and includes a paved driveway, a front lawn, and a backyard area with a pool partially visible behind the trees. The house has a geometric, rectilinear design with clean lines and a combination of open and private spaces. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall setting suggests a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A large, modern brick and white house with flat roofs, multiple levels, a driveway, garage, and mature landscaping, set within a fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with several large trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, garage, and the fence enclosing the property, with the driveway extending to the street.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by dense trees, with glimpses of the backyard and a pool area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more of the brick exterior, flat rooflines, and additional landscaping along the side of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a prominent door, small steps, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and a paved driveway.
